goal: Analyze churn risk for declining-usage accounts, check renewal dates, and route high/medium risk accounts to the appropriate team

available_tools.name: crm_search
available_tools.description: Search CRM accounts by filter criteria. Returns matching accounts.

available_tools.name: inventory_query
available_tools.description: Query inventory levels for a product or SKU.

available_tools.name: email_send
available_tools.description: Send an email to an account contact. Returns delivery confirmation.

available_tools.name: audit_log
available_tools.description: Log an action for compliance and audit trail.

available_tools.name: crm_get_account
available_tools.description: Get details for a specific CRM account by ID.

available_tools.name: subscription_check
available_tools.description: Check the subscription status for an account. Returns status, plan, and renewal date.

available_tools.name: calendar_check
available_tools.description: Check availability on a calendar for a date range.

available_tools.name: notification_send
available_tools.description: Send a push notification or SMS to a user.

constraints: High-risk accounts (renewal < 30 days) go to retention team
Medium-risk accounts (renewal 30-90 days) go to customer success team
Low-risk accounts (renewal > 90 days) require no action
Log all escalations to the audit trail
